overall.description: Static elevated view of Times Square in Marvel's Spider-Man game during golden hour sunset. Spider-Man is perched on a building ledge overlooking heavy traffic and illuminated digital billboards while vehicles flow continuously through the intersection below.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square intersection with digital billboards and heavy vehicle traffic

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on a building ledge on the left side, overlooking the traffic and intersection below

notable_agents.action: Spider-Man perched on building ledge in crouched position, observing the street below

entered.detail: Large vertical digital billboard displaying 'BUMPY SAINTS' advertisement with portrait image
Digital billboard with 'COLEXCO' text in red and white colors
Large red digital billboard with 'INTENSE IMPERSONAL' text dominating the right side of the frame
Tall building with multiple stacked digital screens and spire at the end of the street canyon
Multi-lane asphalt street with yellow taxi cabs and other vehicles moving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: Static elevated view captures Times Square during golden hour with warm sunset lighting mixing with artificial billboard glow. Spider-Man crouches on a left building ledge observing the dense traffic flow of yellow taxis below. Prominent digital advertisements including 'BUMPY SAINTS' and 'INTENSE IMPERSONAL' illuminate the sides of the street canyon, while the One Times Square tower rises in the center distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of Times Square, capturing the intersection as the natural warmth of a golden hour sunset blends with the artificial brilliance of city lights. It begins with a wide view of the urban canyon, where Spider-Man crouches on a building ledge to the left, overlooking the dense flow of yellow taxis below. As the camera lingers, the glow from prominent digital advertisements like BUMPY SAINTS and INTENSE IMPERSONAL intensifies against the deepening colors of the sky. The scene then settles on the architectural depth of the street, framing the One Times Square tower as it rises prominently in the center distance.
